rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BARBARA ROBINSON SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST *TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA*
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, FEES
rulings.Rulings: continued to September 21, 2015 for proper notice and providing courtesy copies to the examiner. the Declaration re fees was noticed prior to filing and was not noticed for 30 days. A Notice of Hearing must be sent for the Declaration no later than August 22, 2015. File stamped courtesy copies of the POS and petition must be provided to the examiner in Room 202 no later than Wednesday, September 16, 2015. It is noted the late filing and noticing of the fee declaration was also an issue in the 2nd account.
